languages.original_text: "Again, you speak in riddles, gothi. What do you mean by 'outrun time'? I've never met an enemy whose head you lop off first, and only then does he run away from you."

languages.text: "Ты снова говоришь загадками, готи. Что значит, "обогнать время"? Ни разу еще не видел врага, которому сначала ты сносишь голову, а только потом он от тебя сбегает".
languages.translation_comment: after the battle with the Necron Chronomancer inside the Trazyn Museum

languages.text: "Again, you speak in riddles, gothi. What do you mean by 'outrun time'? I've never met an enemy whose head you lop off first, and only then does he run away from you."
languages.original_text: "Ты снова говоришь загадками, готи. Что значит, "обогнать время"? Ни разу еще не видел врага, которому сначала ты сносишь голову, а только потом он от тебя сбегает".

traits.locale_text: "Again, you speak in riddles, gothi. What do you mean by 'outrun time'? I've never met an enemy whose head you lop off first, and only then does he run away from you."
"Again, you speak in riddles, gothi. What do you mean by 'outrun time'? I've never met an enemy whose head you lop off first, and only then does he run away from you."
"Again, you speak in riddles, gothi. What do you mean by 'outrun time'? I've never met an enemy whose head you lop off first, and only then does he run away from you."

languages.text: 「また、謎めいた言葉で話すのね、ゴッティ。あなたは「交換」とはどういう意味なのか？頭を切り落とされた敵が逃げるなんて、見たことがない」
languages.original_text: "Again, you speak in riddles, gothi. What do you mean by 'swaps'? I've never met an enemy whose head you lop off first, and only then does he run away from you."

traits.locale_text: 「また、謎めいた言葉で話すのね、ゴッティ。あなたは「交換」とはどういう意味なのか？頭を切り落とされた敵が逃げるなんて、見たことがないわ。」

languages.text: « Vous parlez encore par énigmes, gothi. Qu'entendez-vous par "échapper au temps" ? Je n'ai jamais rencontré d'ennemi qui s'enfuit après qu'on lui a coupé la tête. »
languages.original_text: "Again, you speak in riddles, gothi. What do you mean by 'outrun time'? I've never met an enemy whose head you lop off first, and only then does he run away from you."

traits.locale_text: « Vous parlez encore par énigmes, gothi. Qu'entendez-vous par "échapper au temps" ? Je n'ai jamais rencontré d'ennemi qui s'enfuit après qu'on lui a coupé la tête. »

languages.text: "Ihr sprecht wieder einmal in Rätseln, Gothi. "Was meint Ihr mit 'der Zeit entfliehen'? Ich habe noch keinen Gegner getroffen, der erst geflohen ist, nachdem er seinen Kopf verloren hatte."
languages.original_text: "Again, you speak in riddles, gothi. What do you mean by 'outrun time'? I've never met an enemy whose head you lop off first, and only then does he run away from you."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr sprecht wieder einmal in Rätseln, Gothi. "Was meint Ihr mit 'der Zeit entfliehen'? Ich habe noch keinen Gegner getroffen, der erst geflohen ist, nachdem er seinen Kopf verloren hatte."

languages.text: "Yine bilmecelerle konuşuyorsun gothi. 'Zamandan kaçmak' ile neyi kastediyorsun? Önce kafasını kestiğin, sonra senden kaçan bir düşmanla hiç karşılaşmadım."
languages.original_text: "Again, you speak in riddles, gothi. What do you mean by 'outrun time'? I've never met an enemy whose head you lop off first, and only then does he run away from you."

traits.locale_text: "Yine bilmecelerle konuşuyorsun gothi. 'Zamandan kaçmak' ile neyi kastediyorsun? Önce kafasını kestiğin, sonra senden kaçan bir düşmanla hiç karşılaşmadım."

languages.text: «Vuelves a hablar con acertijos, gothi. ¿Qué quieres decir con "sobreponerse al tiempo"? Nunca he visto un enemigo que eche a correr después de que le cortes la cabeza».
languages.original_text: "Again, you speak in riddles, gothi. What do you mean by 'outrun time'? I've never met an enemy whose head you lop off first, and only then does he run away from you."

traits.locale_text: «Vuelves a hablar con acertijos, gothi. ¿Qué quieres decir con "sobreponerse al tiempo"? Nunca he visto un enemigo que eche a correr después de que le cortes la cabeza».

languages.text: “你又开始打哑谜了，萨满。‘跑赢时间’是什么意思？我从没见过哪个敌人会让你先砍掉它的头，然后再从你面前跑掉。”
languages.original_text: "Again, you speak in riddles, gothi. What do you mean by 'outrun time'? I've never met an enemy whose head you lop off first, and only then does he run away from you."
